final:
module top_module(
  input A0,
  input A1,
  input S,
  output X
);// select A0 if S is 0, A1 if S is 1
  assign X = (!S) ? A0 : A1;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= A1; // This should never be executed
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: X <= A1; // This should never be executed
